why_cooling: Bladder packs are cooling as ultralight users hand off to soft flasks and filter-in-cap setups.
recommended_action: Hold and cut reorders, timing clearance of bladder inventory before soft-flask substitution deepens.

why_cooling: Maximalist stack heights are cooling as US runners shift back toward lower stack and ground feel.
recommended_action: Hold and monitor, trimming reorders on maximalist models and timing clearance.

why_cooling: Legacy PFAS hardshells are declining as DACH regulation and PFAS-free alternatives push users away.
recommended_action: Hold and aggressively clear legacy PFAS membrane stock ahead of tightening regulation.
